test_cases.name: Check for 'os' import
test_cases.flexibility_note: Student code must import the 'os' module.

test_cases.name: Check for API key retrieval using os.environ
test_cases.fail_if: The API key is not retrieved using os.environ.
test_cases.condition: The solution retrieves the API key using os.environ.
test_cases.flexibility_note: Student code must use os.environ to retrieve the API key.
